summary: Iteration 19 - Comprehensive testing of Data Tiering Engine, Report Packages (Broker Deck, Carrier Bordereaux, Utilization Review), AI Provider Call Center Agent, Risk Dial Widget, and Plan Builder. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all features working correctly.

issues: Risk Dial Widget not visible on Dashboard - may need groups with stop-loss configured to display

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested all new features: Data Tiering Engine (Tier 1/2/3 classification, batch classify, risk dial), Report Packages (Broker Deck with surplus/paid, Carrier Bordereaux with member details, Utilization Review with top providers/CPTs/network leakage), AI Provider Agent (GPT-5.2 powered chat, provider auth via Tax ID, escalation to Examiner Queue, call logs), and Plan Builder (all 6 tabs: General, Cost Sharing, Benefits, Network, Risk Management, Exclusions). All APIs return correct data structures. AI Agent successfully responds with HIPAA-compliant messages and uses DB context. Previous iterations 16-18 covered SFTP, Funding, Check Runs, Wells Fargo integration.

endpoints_tested: GET /api/tiering/summary - Tier breakdown with counts (Tier 1: 12 claims, Tier 2: 0, Tier 3: 0)
GET /api/tiering/risk-dial - Risk dial data with groups and summary
GET /api/reports/broker-deck - Broker deck with groups, totals ($1.2M premium, $820 paid, $1.08M surplus)
GET /api/reports/utilization-review - Top providers, CPTs, network leakage
POST /api/ai-agent/chat - GPT-5.2 powered chat with DB context

tabs_tested: General - Plan info, dates, network type
Risk Management - Stop-loss attachment points, auto-flag logic

widgets_tested: Funding Health Widget - ASO/Level Funded/Fully Insured breakdown
Dashboard Metrics - Total claims, pending review, total paid, duplicate savings
